reforms.description: Estonia has introduced several grant, loan, and guarantee programmes to ease financial constraints faced by innovative and start-up firms, managed by Enterprise Estonia and KredEx. Additionally, the Estonian government aims to enhance the effectiveness of innovation policies by evaluating the efficiency and impact of various support programmes.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The introduction of financial support programmes is expected to alleviate financial constraints for innovative firms, thereby fostering innovation and economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The reforms have been actively managed and are currently in force.
reforms.importance_rationale: The reforms represent significant but narrower changes aimed at improving innovation support mechanisms.
reforms.source_quote: To ease financial constraints faced by innovative and start-up firms, the authorities established several grant, loan and guarantee programmes.
